title: Certificates/Forms Assistance * Disabilities Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Certificates/Forms Assistance * Disabilities Issues 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Disabilities Issues Immigration Issues Transgender Individuals Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CLACKAMAS COUNTY SOCIAL SERVICES DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides case management and helps access available services and resources to eligible individuals who experience Intellectual and/or Developmental Disabilities. Service coordinators connect individuals to services which may include in-home support, residential services, supported living, employment, alternatives to employment, transportation, protective services, and other community resources and benefits. 2051 Kaen Road #135 Oregon City, OR 97045 Eligibility: Children and adults with an Intellectual and/or Developmental Disabilities who meet the eligibility criteria. Applicants must be an Oregon resident. Hours: Monday-Thursday 7am-6pm Email (503) 557-2824 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLACKAMAS COUNTY SOCIAL SERVICES DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES
